title: psychotria nekouana
intro: Psychotria nekouana is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, commonly known as the Ne Kouana tree or the Kouana tree. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria nekouana include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
